title: Triggers
description: Membuat dan mengelola trigger di MySQL.

commands.name: CREATE TRIGGER
commands.title: Membuat Trigger
commands.description: Membuat trigger — aksi otomatis saat INSERT, UPDATE, atau DELETE.
commands.examples:
-- Log perubahan harga produk
DELIMITER //
CREATE TRIGGER log_price_change
AFTER UPDATE ON products
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
  IF OLD.price != NEW.price THEN
    INSERT INTO price_history (product_id, old_price, new_price, changed_at)
    VALUES (NEW.id, OLD.price, NEW.price, NOW());
  END IF;
END //
DELIMITER ;

-- Auto-update stock
DELIMITER //
CREATE TRIGGER update_stock_after_order
AFTER INSERT ON order_items
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
  UPDATE products SET stock = stock - NEW.quantity
  WHERE id = NEW.product_id;
END //
DELIMITER ;

-- Validasi sebelum insert
DELIMITER //
CREATE TRIGGER validate_order_total
BEFORE INSERT ON orders
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
  IF NEW.total < 0 THEN
    SIGNAL SQLSTATE '45000' SET MESSAGE_TEXT = 'Total cannot be negative';
  END IF;
END //
DELIMITER ;
commands.notes: BEFORE trigger bisa memodifikasi NEW values. AFTER trigger tidak bisa.

commands.name: DROP TRIGGER
commands.title: Menghapus Trigger

commands.name: SHOW TRIGGERS
commands.title: Tampilkan Trigger
